Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Image.alt: The Principle
The Principle

Video.summary: Bread is a branded product with an endless number of varieties and providers. But do we actually know what we eat every day? We meet small craft bakers who stand up for their quality and we meet CEOs who work on bread as an industrial mass product which becomes increasingly artificial. How can traditional bakery skills survive? And how will the future of bread look like?
Video.title: BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE

Image.alt: BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE
BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE

Video.summary: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.
Video.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered

Image.alt: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
Fantastic Fungi: Remastered

Video.summary: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Aptivio

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Aptivio
Fund Tank - Aptivio
Fund Tank - Aptivio

Video.summary: Matthew Aarsvold, the owner and president of IKW Solutions, takes center stage, seeking $1,000,000 to elevate his innovative software, Constantly Current. This cutting-edge prototype promises to transform Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems by ensuring they remain updated seamlessly, offering potential time and cost savings for businesses.
Video.title: Fund Tank - IKW Solutions

Image.alt: Fund Tank - IKW Solutions
Fund Tank - IKW Solutions
Fund Tank - IKW Solutions

Video.summary: Sherri Loomer seeks $100,000 to elevate her cherished venture, Your Animal's Best Friend, to the next level. With a profound dedication to animal care, Sherri outlines her company's journey, emphasizing its mission to offer unparalleled pet services. Despite hurdles, such as a steep rent hike, overcoming breast cancer, and the necessity for more staff, Sherri's commitment to her enterprise is evident.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend
Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend
Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend

Video.summary: John Comack, owner of Green Energy Technology, a company specializing in EV charging stations, seeks funding to expand his business. With a vision for growth and a turnkey solution approach, John impresses the panel with his strategic mindset and grasp of the market.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Green Energy Technology

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Green Energy Technology
Fund Tank - Green Energy Technology
Fund Tank - Green Energy Technology

Video.summary: Dan Notartomaso seeks $650,000 in funding for his companies, Peak Custom Construction and Oak and Iron Design Co. As Dan unveils his unique niche in high-end home remodels catering to professional athletes, the panel of experts delve into his ambitious plans and financial challenges. With rapid growth during the pandemic, Dan grapples with cash flow issues and the need for strategic investment.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Peak Custom Construction

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Peak Custom Construction
Fund Tank - Peak Custom Construction
Fund Tank - Peak Custom Construction

Video.summary: Mother-daughter duo Tosha Wright and Lisa Dunnigan from Teach Your Heart Out seek $600,000 in funding to propel their educational conference business to new heights. With a mission to rejuvenate and empower educators nationwide, they share their inspiring journey and ambitious plans with the panel of experts. Despite facing challenges such as the impact of COVID-19 on educational conferences and the need for strategic expansion, Tosha and Lisa impress with their passion and dedication to their cause.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out

Video.summary: Want to keep the fires burning even when you’re too tired? Got questions about how long ED medications last? We break it down on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning
Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning
Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning

Video.summary: Keeping it sexy between the sheets is possible even without the big “O” and a man wonders if he can get intimate post-heart attack. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm
Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm
Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm

Video.summary: Are aphrodisiacs really a love potion? And the experts weigh in on the science of sex addiction. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs
Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs
Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs

Video.summary: Jacqueline Murphy Joins Rico No Suave for A Special Talk Show! You are in for a treat on the show as we have an awesome guest and Actor to bless us with inspiration on how she became an actor and producer and all of the great people she has met over time in her career and still blowing up!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy

Video.summary: The Actor, Stuntman and Motion Capture Artist Chuck Johnson! Get to know Chuck Johnson tuning in from Tokyo, Japan, Learn about Martial Arts, Learn from Chuck about his passion of teaching people the art of wanting to be in a movie. You will learn alot in this interview!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson

Video.summary: Gerard HipHopGamer Williams heats it up on the show! Bringing the heat of Hip Hop and video gaming on the show, this is why we call him the GOAT OF THE GAME, you will learn a lot from this interview about Rico and Gerard that makes the interview so powerful. Discipline is key to everyone that wants to be successful. Let's goo!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams

Video.summary: HOPE IS HERE features inspiring and uplifting, relevant and refreshing, personal stories told by cancer survivors, their families, and the loved ones of those who lost the fight against this “emperor of all maladies” and sparked a movement that gives added meaning to their lives. Their moving stories show how the light of hope is salvaged from depths of despair.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1

Video.summary: Lung cancer diagnoses for young, non-smoking individuals are a growing trend. But that didn't intimidate the athletic and courageous lung cancer patient, 21-year-old Jill Costello. Jill's fighting spirit and her desire to help find a cure and eradicate the stigma that only smokers contracted the disease would eventually define her legacy.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2

Video.summary: Hank Baskett was given the grim diagnosis of stage 4 lung cancer almost ten years ago. At the time his thoughts were not of himself but of how he was going to tell his family. In episode 3 of Hope is Here we meet Hank and his family and learn how he was able to push forward towards health with a hopeful attitude and mission that his cancer journey would be, in his words, a joyful one.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3

Video.summary: Gina Hollenbeck is positive about life. Every day she lives with an optimistic desire to overcome and thrive despite a stage 4 lung cancer diagnosis. As a young mother of two boys, she forges ahead towards a vibrant and meaningful journey with a mission to help find a cure for not only herself but for others who suffer from this deadly disease.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4

Video.summary: Emily Bennett Taylor and her husband Miles were newlyweds with a bright future planned. Just as they were house hunting and talking about raising a family Emily received the news that she had stage 4 lung cancer. She and her husband recall their cancer journey and recount their determination to live life to its fullest while fighting for the chance to have children despite a grave cancer diagnosis.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5

Video.summary: Life can be full of hope and dreams. Lisa Briggs was enjoying a successful business, and a close-knit family while celebrating the arrival of her second child. Yet within months of giving birth Lisa was told the devastating news; she had stage 4 lung cancer. For an athletic, young woman who never smoked, the diagnosis seemed unreal. After the shock wore off, Lisa went into full action ahead as her will to live proved stronger than her devastating cancer.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6

Video.summary: Dr. Heather Browne is a master at transforming conversations between couples. She shares how she helps couples bridge divides and cultivate more fulfilling relationships. Plus, we are back in India chatting with some cute kids and sharing good news.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart
Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart
Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart

Video.summary: Hollywood star, Sean Kanan, helps you unleash your inner warrior and change your life with his new book. We head to Rochester, NY, for a party that has been 46 years in the making. And we go international with inspiring conversations from India and Italy!
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior
Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior
Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior

Video.summary: Suffering has deep social causes. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains how your physiology is impacted by stress and social determinants.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Video.summary: Addiction is neither a choice you make or an unavoidable disease. It’s an attempt to solve a problem. The conundrum is… it almost works.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Video.summary: Expressions of healthy anger are different from unhealthy anger. Dr. Maté articulates the difference and discusses the increased health risks when healthy anger is repressed.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Video.summary: What is the meaning of health? In this lesson, you’ll learn what health looks like and how to approach healing with compassionate inquiry and healthy disillusionment.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Video.summary: Radio icon and Radio Hall of Fame Inductee Shadoe Stevens is our guest on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Stevens talks about the obstacles he had to overcome in order to succeed in radio. He also talks about his children's book and the passion and drive needed to be successful. He credits FAILURE as the driving force of his success!
Video.title: LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens

Image.alt: LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens
LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens
LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens

Video.summary: Actress Jacqueline Murphy talks about her vast experience in the entertainment industry as well as her incredible work in Pepito's America.
Video.title: LSWMH - Jacqueline Murphy

Image.alt: LSWMH - Jacqueline Murphy
LSWMH - Jacqueline Murphy
LSWMH - Jacqueline Murphy

Video.summary: Sharon Lechter, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Lisa Nichols, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter
World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter
World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter

Video.summary: Today's practice is an exploration of healing, the deep inner work that yoga opens you up to.
Video.title: Day 5: Healing Padangusthasana

Image.alt: Day 5: Healing Padangusthasana
Day 5: Healing Padangusthasana
Day 5: Healing Padangusthasana

Video.summary: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self.
Video.title: Day 6: Breath Utkatasana

Image.alt: Day 6: Breath Utkatasana
Day 6: Breath Utkatasana
Day 6: Breath Utkatasana

Video.summary: The longest moto ride of the trip awaits, after a grueling 20 day journey and coming down from Hemkund Sahib, we ride to Rishikesh, where the journey began. But nightfall might set in and cause troubles and challenges. As we know, challenges reveal who we are and the Ganga River serves up a challenge for our narrator Adam, as he learns a deep lesson foretold in episode one. Is the Ganga a mother?
Video.title: A Treacherous Ride Home

Image.alt: A Treacherous Ride Home
A Treacherous Ride Home
A Treacherous Ride Home

Video.summary: We finish at the Sacred Ganga River, where we began. The riders reflect on their journey and the idea of freedom has set in fully. It is our responsibility for choosing how we see the world. To embrace this power, It takes courage, discipline and strength. Something as Sacred as Freedom demands our totality. Thankfully, we are greater than we can imagine.
Video.title: We are Greater than we know.

Image.alt: We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.
